business.type_label: winery / wine-tasting venue with online wine shop, tasting reservations, and wine-club memberships
business.geography_hint: Dry Creek Valley, Sonoma County, CA, USA

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is checking a PLACE (a winery to visit): photos, tasting experiences, location in Dry Creek Valley, hours, and directions drive the decision. Browsing the venue/experiences IS the decision, before dentist-style credentials or a portfolio.

goal.one_action: get the visitor to book a tasting reservation and/or buy wine / join the wine club

structure.archetype_note: Full winery site with several parallel conversion paths (visit/reserve, shop, memberships) rather than one action — reservations via Tock embed, wine e-commerce with cart/checkout, and recurring club/subscription memberships.

mapped.observed_as: Wet your whistle / Voted the Bay Area's Best Winery
A Family Legacy Over 50 Years in the Making
Located in the Heart and Soul of Dry Creek Valley
The flagship winery of dry creek valley
Plan Your Visit (Guided Tastings, Estate Flight & Picnic, Vineyard Stroll, Bocce, Bold Dreams)
Our Story / Dry Creek Vineyard from stem to stern (Kim Stare Wallace)
Wine Clubs (20-25% savings) / Signature Wines Subscriptions
CCSW Certified / SF Gate Best Winery 2026

unmapped.observed: Shop Our Wines category-filtered product grid (All/White/Red/Winery Exclusives/90+ Point/Gift Sets…)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A filterable e-commerce wine catalog with cart/checkout is not a landing-page section; it's a storefront

unmapped.observed: Claudine's Wine Garden & Private Events venue detail links
unmapped.why_no_fit: Sub-venue/event-space detail pages, deeper than a single section

proposed_new.name: external-booking-redirect
proposed_new.evidence: All 'BOOK A TASTING' / 'Book Your Reservation' CTAs hand off to a third-party Tock reservations embed; no on-site scheduling

proposed_new.name: storefront-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: Shop page has a category-filtered wine product grid with prices and cart/checkout (WooCommerce-likely) selling one-time goods

proposed_new.name: membership-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: Wine Clubs (20-25% savings) and Signature Wines Subscriptions are recurring purchase plans with a plan configurator

components_needed: product catalog grid with category filters

confidence.why: fetch_quality is 'rendered' not 'full', and the shop product grid never rendered (prices/SKUs unreadable via AJAX); Tock booking fields not inspectable. Overall structure and engine are clear but commerce detail is partial.

gap_findings: Multi-conversion-path venue: one page simultaneously drives reserve (Tock), buy-wine (checkout), and join-club (recurring) — the 5 closed engines assume ONE action; 'place' captures the visit intent but not the parallel commerce.
Third-party reservation embeds (Tock) and hosted wine e-commerce sit outside the form/call/subscribe/redirect/donate mechanism set except as generic 'redirect'.
Recurring wine-club/subscription membership has no capability expression beyond the proposed membership-checkout.
